title: Charlotte Prepares for Wet Weather After Comfortable Sunday
summary: A serene Sunday with highs in the 70s precedes a forecast of rain and potential storms for Monday.
charlotte_impact: Impacts daily routines and outdoor activities; residents should stay informed about weather updates.

title: Charlotte Mayoral Race: Council Weighs Options Before Applications
summary: Charlotte City Council considers factors as the application process for the next mayoral race approaches.
charlotte_impact: Sets the stage for the upcoming election and influences the pool of potential candidates.

title: Shelby Officer Fired; SBI Investigates Use of Force
summary: A Shelby police officer was terminated, and the NC SBI is investigating a use-of-force incident.
charlotte_impact: Highlights accountability and transparency in law enforcement practices.

title: Shooting Reported in Northeast Charlotte
summary: One person was shot on Graypark Drive near Orr Street in northeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and potential community impact.

title: Widespread Flooding Closes Restaurants, Strands Cars in Union County
summary: Severe flooding in Union County led to restaurant closures and stranded vehicles.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the destructive power of severe weather and its impact on local businesses.

title: Fan Remembers Meeting NASCAR Legend Kyle Busch
summary: Pamela Hauck reflects on her unexpected final meeting with NASCAR legend Kyle Busch.
charlotte_impact: Offers a personal perspective on the impact of a beloved sports figure.

title: Wrongful Death Lawsuit Filed in Statesville Plane Crash
summary: Greg Biffle's ex-wife sues over a plane crash that killed 7, alleging negligence.
charlotte_impact: Seeks accountability for the tragic accident and raises questions about aviation safety.

title: CMS Addresses Technical Issues Disrupting End-of-Year Testing
summary: Technical problems with end-of-year testing cause anxiety for Charlotte-Mecklenburg students and parents.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the challenges of technology integration in education and its impact on students.

title: Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Against Builder Over Construction Issues
summary: A Denver couple wins a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraud.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the risks involved in construction projects and the importance of legal recourse.

title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman During Arrest
summary: A Shelby police officer was suspended for punching a woman during an arrest.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about police conduct and the use of force.

title: Thieves Target Clover Neighborhood for Second Time
summary: Multiple vehicles were broken into in Clover, with at least one gun stolen.
charlotte_impact: Increases community concerns about safety and property crime.

title: Salisbury Teacher Arrested on Sex Offense Charges Involving Former Student
summary: David Steelman, 51, faces multiple sex offense charges involving a former student dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Undermines trust in educational institutions and highlights the severity of such crimes.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Apron Expansion
summary: The FAA awarded Charlotte Douglas $46.9M to expand the airport apron.
charlotte_impact: Supports infrastructure development and improves airport capacity.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run in North Charlotte
summary: Frank Leon Dent died months after a hit-and-run on West Sugar Creek Road.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the tragic consequences of hit-and-run incidents and the need for justice.

title: Suspect Arrested in Hit-and-Run of 8-Year-Old in South Charlotte
summary: Shaiquailalia Di Ndia Lashi Harris was charged with felony hit-and-run after an 8-year-old was struck by a vehicle.
charlotte_impact: Addresses community concerns about pedestrian safety and accountability for reckless driving.
